---
title: "hib"
author: "bian"
date: "2025-11-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
source("anovakun_489.txt")
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)
```

```{r}
percent_data <- read.csv("statistics_by_ID_condition_percent_pi20pi20.csv")

assign("start_id", 1, envir = .GlobalEnv)
assign("end_id", 100, envir = .GlobalEnv)
missing_ids <- c()
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 42))#width100
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 20,59,73,83,57,19,55,70,79,92,38))#PI20
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 59,83,57,55,79,73)) #accuracy
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 20,57,19,70,92,38))#PI20
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 14))#miss of syou
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 47,50,55))#RT too long
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 96,31))#width偏差
missing_ids <- sort(c(missing_ids, 98,13,66))#視線ない
missing_ids1 <- missing_ids

# 删除这些ID对应的行
percent_data<- percent_data[!percent_data$ID %in% missing_ids1, ]

id_count <- length(unique(percent_data$ID))
print(paste("非重复的ID个数：", id_count))

print(unique(percent_data$ID))
```


###総反応時間
```{r}
all_RT <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_RT = mean_RT / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  
  # 按ID、order、gender、condition和分组计算均值
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_RT = mean(mean_RT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

anovakun(all_RT, "ABsCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_RT",
         auto = T,
         cin = T,
         peta = T)
```
```{r}
# 首先安装包（如果还没安装）
# install.packages("ggh4x")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# 数据准备代码相同...
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.7162, 0.6321, 0.7787, 0.7586, 0.6522, 0.8617, 0.6722, 0.5744, 0.6965,
    0.8163, 0.6295, 0.7784, 0.7869, 0.6325, 0.8061, 0.7788, 0.5604, 0.6748,
    0.7958, 0.6606, 0.8770, 0.7077, 0.5659, 0.6976, 0.6530, 0.5273, 0.6297,
    0.8073, 0.7172, 0.9787, 0.7832, 0.5905, 0.7506, 0.7946, 0.5651, 0.7054
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6748, 0.6001, 0.7384, 0.6919, 0.5959, 0.7783, 0.6061, 0.5371, 0.6418,
    0.7480, 0.5921, 0.7093, 0.7277, 0.6025, 0.7528, 0.7247, 0.5116, 0.6285,
    0.6751, 0.6176, 0.7764, 0.6523, 0.5134, 0.6549, 0.6055, 0.4631, 0.5613,
    0.7463, 0.6609, 0.8725, 0.7192, 0.5481, 0.7076, 0.7257, 0.5185, 0.6733
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7577, 0.6641, 0.8189, 0.8253, 0.7085, 0.9451, 0.7383, 0.6117, 0.7513,
    0.8846, 0.6669, 0.8475, 0.8461, 0.6625, 0.8594, 0.8329, 0.6093, 0.7211,
    0.9164, 0.7036, 0.9776, 0.7632, 0.6184, 0.7402, 0.7004, 0.5916, 0.6982,
    0.8682, 0.7736, 1.0850, 0.8472, 0.6330, 0.7935, 0.8635, 0.6116, 0.7375
  )
)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group, 
                                  levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                  labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                            color = condition, 
                            group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.3, size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender, 
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",           # 所有面板都显示轴
              remove_labels = "x") +  # 移除上方的x轴标签
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("f" = "#9370DB", "u1" = "#FFA500", "u2" = "#4169E1")
  ) +
  labs(x = "", 
       y = "Reaction Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.2), breaks = seq(0.4, 1.2, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Times New Roman") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", family = "Times New Roman"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, family = "Times New Roman"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 11, family = "Times New Roman"),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)
```
###order組2次
```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_RT_data <- all_RT %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_RT_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_RT",auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割uf组数据
uf_RT_data <- all_RT %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析uf组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_RT_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_RT",auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```

###condion組2次
```{r}
# 分割f组数据
f_RT_data <- all_RT %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析F组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(f_RT_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_RT",auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割u1组数据
u1_RT_data <- all_RT %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析u1组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u1_RT_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_RT",auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割u2组数据
u2_RT_data <- all_RT %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析u2组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u2_RT_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_RT",auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```


```{r}
# 元のデータ処理
all_RT <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_RT = mean_RT / 1000000) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_RT = mean(mean_RT, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# conditionをwide形式に変換
all_RT_wide <- all_RT %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = condition,
    values_from = mean_RT
  )

# データ1: f - u2
diff_f_u2 <- all_RT_wide %>%
  mutate(RT_diff = f - u2) %>%
  select(ID, order, gender, percent_group, RT_diff)

# データ2: u1 - u2
diff_u1_u2 <- all_RT_wide %>%
  mutate(RT_diff = u1 - u2) %>%
  select(ID, order, gender, percent_group, RT_diff)

# 分散分析1: f - u2
cat("\n=== f条件 - u2条件の分散分析 ===\n")
anovakun(diff_f_u2, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "RT_diff",
         auto = TRUE,
         cin = TRUE,
         peta = TRUE)

# 分散分析2: u1 - u2
cat("\n=== u1条件 - u2条件の分散分析 ===\n")
anovakun(diff_u1_u2, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "RT_diff",
         auto = TRUE,
         cin = TRUE,
         peta = TRUE)
```


###総注視時間


```{r}
all_gaze <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s = mean_total_gaze_time_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、gender、condition和分组计算均值
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
anovakun(all_gaze, "ABsCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# データ準備コードは同じ...
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.6765, 0.5947, 0.7339, 0.7209, 0.6164, 0.8119, 0.6369, 0.5424, 0.6610,
    0.7704, 0.5938, 0.7346, 0.7305, 0.5872, 0.7468, 0.7453, 0.5360, 0.6454,
    0.7296, 0.6107, 0.8048, 0.6496, 0.5239, 0.6449, 0.5970, 0.4835, 0.5787,
    0.7702, 0.6818, 0.9273, 0.7434, 0.5610, 0.7121, 0.7415, 0.5311, 0.6585
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6392, 0.5659, 0.6989, 0.6610, 0.5694, 0.7381, 0.5719, 0.5121, 0.6087,
    0.7086, 0.5574, 0.6656, 0.6721, 0.5589, 0.6972, 0.6932, 0.4899, 0.6035,
    0.6281, 0.5700, 0.7129, 0.5997, 0.4760, 0.6039, 0.5543, 0.4271, 0.5179,
    0.7086, 0.6275, 0.8251, 0.6741, 0.5180, 0.6677, 0.6908, 0.4852, 0.6200
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7138, 0.6235, 0.7688, 0.7808, 0.6635, 0.8857, 0.7019, 0.5727, 0.7132,
    0.8322, 0.6302, 0.8036, 0.7888, 0.6156, 0.7965, 0.7974, 0.5822, 0.6874,
    0.8311, 0.6513, 0.8967, 0.6995, 0.5718, 0.6858, 0.6397, 0.5400, 0.6395,
    0.8317, 0.7361, 1.0295, 0.8126, 0.6040, 0.7564, 0.7922, 0.5769, 0.6969
  )
)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

# conditionの図例ラベルを設定
plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  # geom_point()を削除
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"  # 図例のタイトル
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "AOIGaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.2), 
                     breaks = seq(0.4, 1.2, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",  # "none"から"right"に変更
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "narrow_high_res_plot.png",  # 保存的文件名
  plot = p,
  width = 6,        # 【窄图关键】宽度设小一点 (例如 5-6 英寸)
  height = 8,       # 高度设大一点，形成纵向长图
  units = "in",     # 单位：英寸
  dpi = 300         # 【高分辨率关键】300是印刷标准，需要更高可用 600
)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# データ準備（前と同じ）
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.6765, 0.5947, 0.7339, 0.7209, 0.6164, 0.8119, 0.6369, 0.5424, 0.6610,
    0.7704, 0.5938, 0.7346, 0.7305, 0.5872, 0.7468, 0.7453, 0.5360, 0.6454,
    0.7296, 0.6107, 0.8048, 0.6496, 0.5239, 0.6449, 0.5970, 0.4835, 0.5787,
    0.7702, 0.6818, 0.9273, 0.7434, 0.5610, 0.7121, 0.7415, 0.5311, 0.6585
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6392, 0.5659, 0.6989, 0.6610, 0.5694, 0.7381, 0.5719, 0.5121, 0.6087,
    0.7086, 0.5574, 0.6656, 0.6721, 0.5589, 0.6972, 0.6932, 0.4899, 0.6035,
    0.6281, 0.5700, 0.7129, 0.5997, 0.4760, 0.6039, 0.5543, 0.4271, 0.5179,
    0.7086, 0.6275, 0.8251, 0.6741, 0.5180, 0.6677, 0.6908, 0.4852, 0.6200
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7138, 0.6235, 0.7688, 0.7808, 0.6635, 0.8857, 0.7019, 0.5727, 0.7132,
    0.8322, 0.6302, 0.8036, 0.7888, 0.6156, 0.7965, 0.7974, 0.5822, 0.6874,
    0.8311, 0.6513, 0.8967, 0.6995, 0.5718, 0.6858, 0.6397, 0.5400, 0.6395,
    0.8317, 0.7361, 1.0295, 0.8126, 0.6040, 0.7564, 0.7922, 0.5769, 0.6969
  )
)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

# 各パネルでのY軸の最大値を取得して、ブラケットの位置を決定
max_vals <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(order, gender, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(max_y = max(cin_u), .groups = "drop")

# 有意差標記用データを作成
create_bracket <- function(order_val, gender_val, group_val, 
                          cond1, cond2, y_base, height_offset) {
  cond_map <- c("Friend" = 1, "Unknown1" = 2, "Unknown2" = 3)
  x_pos <- which(levels(plot_data$percent_group) == group_val)
  
  data.frame(
    order = order_val,
    gender = gender_val,
    percent_group = group_val,
    x = x_pos + (cond_map[cond1] - 2) * 0.15,
    xend = x_pos + (cond_map[cond2] - 2) * 0.15,
    y = y_base + height_offset
  )
}

# グループ間比較用のブラケット作成関数
create_group_bracket <- function(order_val, gender_val, cond_val,
                                 group1, group2, y_base, height_offset) {
  cond_map <- c("Friend" = 1, "Unknown1" = 2, "Unknown2" = 3)
  group_x_map <- c("Low" = 1, "Middle" = 2, "High" = 3)
  cond_offset <- (cond_map[cond_val] - 2) * 0.15
  
  data.frame(
    order = order_val,
    gender = gender_val,
    percent_group = group1,
    x = group_x_map[group1] + cond_offset,
    xend = group_x_map[group2] + cond_offset,
    y = y_base + height_offset
  )
}

# FU（友人先順）の有意差
# Female FU - Low組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2（層を分ける）
fu_f_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_f_low_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_f_low_max, 0.05)
fu_f_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_f_low_max, 0.05)
fu_f_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_f_low_max, 0.17)
fu_f_low_3$label <- "***"

# Female FU - Middle組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2（層を分ける）
fu_f_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_f_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_f_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_f_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_f_mid_max, 0.17)
fu_f_mid_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Low組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2（層を分ける）
fu_m_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_m_low_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_m_low_max, 0.05)
fu_m_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_m_low_max, 0.05)
fu_m_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_m_low_max, 0.17)
fu_m_low_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Middle組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2（層を分ける）
fu_m_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_m_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_m_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_m_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_m_mid_max, 0.17)
fu_m_mid_3$label <- "***"

# UF（未知同性先順）の有意差
# Female UF - Low組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2（層を分ける）
uf_f_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "f", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_f_low_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_f_low_max, 0.05)
uf_f_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_low_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_f_low_max, 0.13)
uf_f_low_2$label <- "***"

# Female UF - Middle組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2（層を分ける）
uf_f_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "f", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_f_mid_max, 0.05)
uf_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_f_mid_max, 0.13)
uf_f_mid_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Low組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2（層を分ける）
uf_m_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "m", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_m_low_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_m_low_max, 0.05)
uf_m_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_low_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_m_low_max, 0.13)
uf_m_low_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Middle組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2（層を分ける）
uf_m_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "m", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_m_mid_max, 0.05)
uf_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_m_mid_max, 0.13)
uf_m_mid_2$label <- "***"

# 【追加】FU順序（Female & Male両方）におけるFriend条件でのMiddle > High
# Female FU
fu_f_mid_friend_max <- plot_data %>% 
  filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "Middle", condition == "Friend") %>% 
  pull(cin_u)
fu_f_high_friend_max <- plot_data %>% 
  filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "High", condition == "Friend") %>% 
  pull(cin_u)
base_y_f <- max(fu_f_mid_friend_max, fu_f_high_friend_max)

fu_f_mid_vs_high <- create_group_bracket("fu", "f", "Friend", 
                                          "Middle", "High", 
                                          base_y_f, 0.28)  # 他のブラケットと重ならないように高い位置に
fu_f_mid_vs_high$label <- "***"

# Male FU
fu_m_mid_friend_max <- plot_data %>% 
  filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "Middle", condition == "Friend") %>% 
  pull(cin_u)
fu_m_high_friend_max <- plot_data %>% 
  filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "High", condition == "Friend") %>% 
  pull(cin_u)
base_y_m <- max(fu_m_mid_friend_max, fu_m_high_friend_max)

fu_m_mid_vs_high <- create_group_bracket("fu", "m", "Friend", 
                                          "Middle", "High", 
                                          base_y_m, 0.28)  # 他のブラケットと重ならないように高い位置に
fu_m_mid_vs_high$label <- "***"

# すべてのブラケットを結合
sig_data <- rbind(
  fu_f_low_1, fu_f_low_2, fu_f_low_3,
  fu_f_mid_1, fu_f_mid_2, fu_f_mid_3,
  fu_m_low_1, fu_m_low_2, fu_m_low_3,
  fu_m_mid_1, fu_m_mid_2, fu_m_mid_3,
  uf_f_low_1, uf_f_low_2,
  uf_f_mid_1, uf_f_mid_2,
  uf_m_low_1, uf_m_low_2,
  uf_m_mid_1, uf_m_mid_2,
  fu_f_mid_vs_high,  # Female追加
  fu_m_mid_vs_high   # Male追加
)

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.8,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  # ブラケット
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  # アスタリスク
  geom_text(data = sig_data,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.02, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 4,
            family = "Arial") +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "AOI Gaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.4),  # 上限を少し拡大
                     breaks = seq(0.4, 1.4, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "narrow_high_res_plot_3way_interaction.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 6,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# データ準備（前と同じ）
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.6765, 0.5947, 0.7339, 0.7209, 0.6164, 0.8119, 0.6369, 0.5424, 0.6610,
    0.7704, 0.5938, 0.7346, 0.7305, 0.5872, 0.7468, 0.7453, 0.5360, 0.6454,
    0.7296, 0.6107, 0.8048, 0.6496, 0.5239, 0.6449, 0.5970, 0.4835, 0.5787,
    0.7702, 0.6818, 0.9273, 0.7434, 0.5610, 0.7121, 0.7415, 0.5311, 0.6585
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6392, 0.5659, 0.6989, 0.6610, 0.5694, 0.7381, 0.5719, 0.5121, 0.6087,
    0.7086, 0.5574, 0.6656, 0.6721, 0.5589, 0.6972, 0.6932, 0.4899, 0.6035,
    0.6281, 0.5700, 0.7129, 0.5997, 0.4760, 0.6039, 0.5543, 0.4271, 0.5179,
    0.7086, 0.6275, 0.8251, 0.6741, 0.5180, 0.6677, 0.6908, 0.4852, 0.6200
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7138, 0.6235, 0.7688, 0.7808, 0.6635, 0.8857, 0.7019, 0.5727, 0.7132,
    0.8322, 0.6302, 0.8036, 0.7888, 0.6156, 0.7965, 0.7974, 0.5822, 0.6874,
    0.8311, 0.6513, 0.8967, 0.6995, 0.5718, 0.6858, 0.6397, 0.5400, 0.6395,
    0.8317, 0.7361, 1.0295, 0.8126, 0.6040, 0.7564, 0.7922, 0.5769, 0.6969
  )
)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

# 各パネルでのY軸の最大値を取得して、ブラケットの位置を決定
max_vals <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(order, gender, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(max_y = max(cin_u), .groups = "drop")

# 有意差標記用データを作成
# 各モーフィンググループ内で条件間を比較

create_bracket <- function(order_val, gender_val, group_val, 
                          cond1, cond2, y_base, height_offset) {
  # 条件を数値に変換（Friend=1, Unknown1=2, Unknown2=3）
  cond_map <- c("Friend" = 1, "Unknown1" = 2, "Unknown2" = 3)
  x_pos <- which(levels(plot_data$percent_group) == group_val)
  
  data.frame(
    order = order_val,
    gender = gender_val,
    percent_group = group_val,
    x = x_pos + (cond_map[cond1] - 2) * 0.15,  # 3つの条件を横に並べる
    xend = x_pos + (cond_map[cond2] - 2) * 0.15,
    y = y_base + height_offset
  )
}

# FU（友人先順）の有意差
# Female FU - Low組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2
fu_f_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_f_low_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_f_low_max, 0.05)
fu_f_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_f_low_max, 0.12)
fu_f_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_f_low_max, 0.19)
fu_f_low_3$label <- "***"

# Female FU - Middle組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2
fu_f_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_f_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_f_mid_max, 0.12)
fu_f_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_f_mid_max, 0.19)
fu_f_mid_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Low組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2
fu_m_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_m_low_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_m_low_max, 0.05)
fu_m_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_m_low_max, 0.12)
fu_m_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_m_low_max, 0.19)
fu_m_low_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Middle組: Friend > Unknown1 > Unknown2
fu_m_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "fu", gender == "m", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
fu_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", fu_m_mid_max, 0.05)
fu_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", fu_m_mid_max, 0.12)
fu_m_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_3 <- create_bracket("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", fu_m_mid_max, 0.19)
fu_m_mid_3$label <- "***"

# UF（未知同性先順）の有意差
# Female UF - Low組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2
uf_f_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "f", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_f_low_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_f_low_max, 0.05)
uf_f_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_low_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_f_low_max, 0.12)
uf_f_low_2$label <- "***"

# Female UF - Middle組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2
uf_f_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "f", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_f_mid_max, 0.05)
uf_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_f_mid_max, 0.12)
uf_f_mid_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Low組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2
uf_m_low_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "m", percent_group == "Low") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_m_low_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_m_low_max, 0.05)
uf_m_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_low_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_m_low_max, 0.12)
uf_m_low_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Middle組: Friend ≈ Unknown1, both > Unknown2
uf_m_mid_max <- max_vals %>% filter(order == "uf", gender == "m", percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(max_y)
uf_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", uf_m_mid_max, 0.05)
uf_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket("uf", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", uf_m_mid_max, 0.12)
uf_m_mid_2$label <- "***"

# すべてのブラケットを結合
sig_data <- rbind(
  fu_f_low_1, fu_f_low_2, fu_f_low_3,
  fu_f_mid_1, fu_f_mid_2, fu_f_mid_3,
  fu_m_low_1, fu_m_low_2, fu_m_low_3,
  fu_m_mid_1, fu_m_mid_2, fu_m_mid_3,
  uf_f_low_1, uf_f_low_2,
  uf_f_mid_1, uf_f_mid_2,
  uf_m_low_1, uf_m_low_2,
  uf_m_mid_1, uf_m_mid_2
)

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.3, size = 0.8,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  # ブラケット
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  # アスタリスク
  geom_text(data = sig_data,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.02, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 4,
            family = "Arial") +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "AOI Gaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.4, 1.3), 
                     breaks = seq(0.4, 1.2, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "narrow_high_res_plot_3way_interaction.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 6,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

###order組3次
```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割UF组数据
uf_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```
###condion組３次
```{r}
# 分割f组数据
f_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(f_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割u1组数据
u1_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u1_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割u2组数据
u2_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u2_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###percent組３次
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
low_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(low_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割middle组数据
middle_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(middle_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割high组数据
high_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(high_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

```{r}
all_gaze_ignoregender <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s = mean_total_gaze_time_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、condition和分组计算均值（移除gender）
  group_by(ID, order, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s = mean(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 运行ANOVA（移除gender因素）
anovakun(all_gaze_ignoregender, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_data <- all_gaze_ignoregender %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割UF组数据
uf_data <- all_gaze_ignoregender %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

####右視野
```{r}
all_gaze <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_time_right_half_ms_s = mean_time_right_half_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、gender、condition和分组计算均值
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_time_right_half_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
anovakun(all_gaze, "ABsCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_right_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```


##########左視野3group
```{r}
all_gaze <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_time_left_half_ms_s = mean_time_left_half_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、gender、condition和分组计算均值
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_time_left_half_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
anovakun(all_gaze, "ABsCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = c("order", "gender"),
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# 新しいデータを作成
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    # uf-m
    0.3700, 0.3483, 0.4115, 0.4255, 0.3656, 0.4490, 0.3841, 0.3255, 0.3920,
    # uf-f
    0.3193, 0.2623, 0.3187, 0.2670, 0.2439, 0.2911, 0.3045, 0.2270, 0.2719,
    # fu-m
    0.3576, 0.2905, 0.3840, 0.3312, 0.2661, 0.3237, 0.2754, 0.2453, 0.2781,
    # fu-f
    0.3859, 0.3668, 0.4578, 0.3727, 0.3115, 0.3681, 0.3938, 0.3044, 0.3574
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    # uf-m
    0.3315, 0.3142, 0.3688, 0.3674, 0.3330, 0.3967, 0.3292, 0.2842, 0.3563,
    # uf-f
    0.2821, 0.2325, 0.2805, 0.2406, 0.2238, 0.2680, 0.2602, 0.1940, 0.2267,
    # fu-m
    0.2539, 0.2309, 0.3014, 0.2513, 0.2199, 0.2556, 0.2057, 0.1852, 0.2108,
    # fu-f
    0.3473, 0.3230, 0.4010, 0.3219, 0.2919, 0.3370, 0.3575, 0.2624, 0.3165
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    # uf-m
    0.4085, 0.3823, 0.4542, 0.4837, 0.3982, 0.5013, 0.4390, 0.3668, 0.4277,
    # uf-f
    0.3566, 0.2922, 0.3568, 0.2935, 0.2641, 0.3142, 0.3488, 0.2600, 0.3171,
    # fu-m
    0.4613, 0.3502, 0.4666, 0.4111, 0.3122, 0.3918, 0.3450, 0.3053, 0.3454,
    # fu-f
    0.4245, 0.4105, 0.5147, 0.4235, 0.3310, 0.3993, 0.4301, 0.3464, 0.3982
  )
)

# percent_groupのファクター設定
plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

# conditionのファクター設定
plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.1, size = 0.8) +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "x") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Left AOI Gaze Time (s)") +  # y軸ラベルを変更
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.1, 0.6),       # y軸範囲を変更
                     breaks = seq(0.1, 0.6, 0.1)) +  # 目盛りも調整
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# データ準備
plot_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    # uf-m
    0.3700, 0.3483, 0.4115, 0.4255, 0.3656, 0.4490, 0.3841, 0.3255, 0.3920,
    # uf-f
    0.3193, 0.2623, 0.3187, 0.2670, 0.2439, 0.2911, 0.3045, 0.2270, 0.2719,
    # fu-m
    0.3576, 0.2905, 0.3840, 0.3312, 0.2661, 0.3237, 0.2754, 0.2453, 0.2781,
    # fu-f
    0.3859, 0.3668, 0.4578, 0.3727, 0.3115, 0.3681, 0.3938, 0.3044, 0.3574
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    # uf-m
    0.3315, 0.3142, 0.3688, 0.3674, 0.3330, 0.3967, 0.3292, 0.2842, 0.3563,
    # uf-f
    0.2821, 0.2325, 0.2805, 0.2406, 0.2238, 0.2680, 0.2602, 0.1940, 0.2267,
    # fu-m
    0.2539, 0.2309, 0.3014, 0.2513, 0.2199, 0.2556, 0.2057, 0.1852, 0.2108,
    # fu-f
    0.3473, 0.3230, 0.4010, 0.3219, 0.2919, 0.3370, 0.3575, 0.2624, 0.3165
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    # uf-m
    0.4085, 0.3823, 0.4542, 0.4837, 0.3982, 0.5013, 0.4390, 0.3668, 0.4277,
    # uf-f
    0.3566, 0.2922, 0.3568, 0.2935, 0.2641, 0.3142, 0.3488, 0.2600, 0.3171,
    # fu-m
    0.4613, 0.3502, 0.4666, 0.4111, 0.3122, 0.3918, 0.3450, 0.3053, 0.3454,
    # fu-f
    0.4245, 0.4105, 0.5147, 0.4235, 0.3310, 0.3993, 0.4301, 0.3464, 0.3982
  )
)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

# dodge幅を設定
dodge_width <- 0.15

# 女性のFriend条件のMiddle組とHigh組の最大値を取得
fu_f_friend_data <- plot_data %>% 
  filter(order == "fu", gender == "f", condition == "Friend", 
         percent_group %in% c("Middle", "High"))

# Middle組のFriend条件のY座標（dodgeを考慮）
middle_y <- fu_f_friend_data %>% filter(percent_group == "Middle") %>% pull(cin_u)
high_y <- fu_f_friend_data %>% filter(percent_group == "High") %>% pull(cin_u)

# ブラケットの高さ（2つのうち高い方に基づく）
bracket_y <- max(middle_y, high_y) + 0.04

# 有意差標記データ（女性のFU Friend条件のMiddle vs Highのみ）
sig_data <- data.frame(
  order = "fu",
  gender = "f",
  condition = "Friend",
  x = 2,      # Middle組の位置
  xend = 3,   # High組の位置
  y = bracket_y,
  label = "***"
)

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = condition)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.3, size = 0.8,
                position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width)) +
  # ブラケット（水平線）
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  # ブラケット（左垂直線）
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  # ブラケット（右垂直線）
  geom_segment(data = sig_data,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  # アスタリスク
  geom_text(data = sig_data,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.018, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 3.5,
            family = "Arial") +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "x") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Left AOI Gaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.1, 0.65),
                     breaks = seq(0.1, 0.6, 0.1)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "left_aoi_simple_sig.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 6,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

###order組3次
```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割UF组数据
uf_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###condion組３次
```{r}
# 分割f组数据
f_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(f_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割u1组数据
u1_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u1_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割u2组数据
u2_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)%>%
  select(-gender)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(u2_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###percent組３次
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
low_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(low_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割middle组数据
middle_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(middle_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割high组数据
high_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(high_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```

###order組4次
```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割UF组数据
uf_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
  
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###fu-gender
```{r}
# 分割Female组数据
fuf_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(gender == "f")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(fuf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割male组数据
fum_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(gender == "m")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(fum_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###fu-condition
```{r}
# 分割f组数据
fuf_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(fuf_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="percent_group",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割u1组数据
fuu1_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(fuu1_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="percent_group",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割u2组数据
fuu2_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(fuu2_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="percent_group",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###fu-percent
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
fulow_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fulow_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割middle组数据
fumiddle_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fumiddle_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割high组数据
fuhigh_data <- fu_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fuhigh_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

###gender組4次
```{r}
# 分割Female组数据
f_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(gender == "f")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(f_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)

# 分割male组数据
m_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(gender == "m")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(m_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```
###male
```{r}
mfu_data <- m_data %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(mfu_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割uf组数据
muf_data <- m_data %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(muf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```


###f-order
```{r}
# 分割Fu组数据
ffu_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(fuf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割uf组数据
fuf_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(fuf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###f-conditon
```{r}
# 分割F组数据
ff_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(ff_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割u1组数据
fu1_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(fu1_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割u2组数据
fu2_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(fu2_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```
###f-percent
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
flow_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(flow_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割middle组数据
fmiddle_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fmiddle_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割high组数据
fhigh_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fhigh_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within ="condition",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```


###condition4次
```{r}
# 分割F组数据
f_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "f")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(f_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割u1组数据
u1_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u1")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(u1_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割u2组数据
u2_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(condition == "u2")%>%
  select(-condition)
anovakun(u2_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###f-order
```{r}
# 分割Fu组数据
ffu_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(ffu_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割uf组数据
fuf_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
anovakun(fuf_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

###f-gender
```{r}
# 分割Female组数据
ff_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(gender == "f")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(ff_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割male组数据
fm_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(gender == "m")%>%
  select(-gender)
anovakun(fm_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###f-percent
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
flow_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(flow_data, "ABs", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割middle组数据
fmiddle_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fmiddle_data, "ABs", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
# 分割low组数据
fhigh_data <- f_data %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(fhigh_data, "ABs", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

###percent4次
```{r}
# 分割low组数据
low_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "low")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(low_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割middle组数据
middle_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "middle")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(middle_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
# 分割high组数据
high_data <- all_gaze %>%
  filter(percent_group == "high")%>%
  select(-percent_group)
anovakun(high_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         auto = T,cin = T,peta = T)
```





















```{r}
all_gaze <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_time_left_half_ms_s = mean_time_left_half_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、condition和分组计算均值（移除gender）
  group_by(ID, order, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_time_left_half_ms_s = mean(mean_time_left_half_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 运行ANOVA（移除gender因素）
anovakun(all_gaze, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# 分割FU组数据
fu_data <- all_gaze_ignoregender %>%
  filter(order == "fu")%>%
  select(-order)

# 分析FU组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(fu_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# 分割UF组数据
uf_data <- all_gaze_ignoregender %>%
  filter(order == "uf")%>%
  select(-order)
# 分析UF组的条件×百分比组交互
anovakun(uf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```




















###order
```{r}
# FU组
fu_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(order == "fu") %>%
  select(-order)

anovakun(fu_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# UF组
uf_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(order == "uf") %>%
  select(-order)

anovakun(uf_data, "AsBC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "gender",
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
####order-gender
```{r}
# FU-female组
fuf_data <- fu_data %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(gender == "f") %>%
  select(-gender)

anovakun(fuf_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# FU-female组
fum_data <- fu_data %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(gender == "m") %>%
  select(-gender)

anovakun(fum_data, "sAB", 
         long = TRUE,
         within = c("condition", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```


condition
```{r}
# F组
f_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(condition == "f") %>%
  select(-condition)

anovakun(f_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# U1组
u1_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(condition == "u1") %>%
  select(-condition)

anovakun(u1_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# U2组
u2_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(condition == "u2") %>%
  select(-condition)

anovakun(u2_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "percent_group", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```
###friend-gender
```{r}
ff_data <- f_data %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(gender == "f") %>%
  select(-gender)

anovakun(ff_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         between = "percent_group",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

 fm_data <- f_data %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(gender == "m") %>%
  select(-gender)

anovakun(fm_data, "AsB", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = "order",
         between = "percent_group",
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```


percent_group
```{r}
# low组
l_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(percent_group == "low") %>%
  select(-percent_group)

anovakun(l_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

#middle组
m_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(percent_group == "middle") %>%
  select(-percent_group)

anovakun(m_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)

# high组
h_data <- all_gaze %>%  # 使用原始包含gender的数据
  filter(percent_group == "high") %>%
  select(-percent_group)

anovakun(h_data, "ABsC", 
         long = TRUE,
         between = c("order","gender"),
         within = "condition", 
         dv = "mean_time_left_half_ms_s",
         eta = TRUE)
```

```{r}
write.csv(percent_data, "percent_data.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: percent_data.csv")
```
```{r}
all_gaze <- percent_data %>% 
  mutate(mean_time_left_half_ms_s = mean_time_left_half_ms / 1000000) %>%
  mutate(mean_time_right_half_ms_s = mean_time_right_half_ms / 1000000) %>%
  mutate(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s = mean_total_gaze_time_ms / 1000000) %>%
  # 创建分组变量
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent >= 0 & percent <= 30 ~ "low",
    percent >= 35 & percent <= 65 ~ "middle",
    percent >= 70 & percent <= 100 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  # 按ID、order、gender、condition和分组计算均值
  group_by(ID, order, gender, condition, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_left_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_time_left_half_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_right_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_time_right_half_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_total_gaze_time_s = mean(mean_total_gaze_time_ms_s, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(all_gaze, "fixation_data.csv", row.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
print("数据已保存到: fixation_data.csv")
```

```{r}
aq_data <- read.csv("fixation_data_withAQ.csv")
```

```{r}
haq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="high")
maq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="middle")
laq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="low")

# 方法1: 使用dplyr分组计算相关系数
correlation_results <- haq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(AQ))
  )
print(correlation_results)

correlation_results2 <- maq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(AQ))
  )
print(correlation_results2)

correlation_results3 <- laq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, AQ)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(AQ))
  )
print(correlation_results3)
```

```{r}
haq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group=="high")
maq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group=="middle")
laq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group=="low")

# 方法1: 使用dplyr分组计算相关系数
correlation_results <- haq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(social))
  )
print(correlation_results)

correlation_results2 <- maq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(social))
  )
print(correlation_results2)

correlation_results3 <- laq %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    correlation = cor(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social, use = "complete.obs"),
    p_value = cor.test(mean_left_gaze_time_s, social)$p.value,
    n = sum(!is.na(mean_left_gaze_time_s) & !is.na(social))
  )
print(correlation_results3)
```


```{r}
# 创建一个函数来为单个condition和group绘图
plot_single <- function(data, group_name, cond, color) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  
  # 创建标签
  label_text <- sprintf("r = %.3f\np = %.3f", cor_value, p_value)
  
  # 确定标签位置
  x_pos <- min(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.05 * (max(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) - min(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE))
  y_pos <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  
  # 绘图
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3, color = color) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2, color = color, fill = color) +
    annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_text, 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste(group_name, "-", toupper(cond)),
         x = "AQ Score",
         y = "Mean Left Gaze Time (s)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10))
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#E41A1C", "u1" = "#377EB8", "u2" = "#4DAF4A")

# High Morph Group
haq_f <- haq %>% filter(condition == "f")
haq_u1 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
haq_u2 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p1 <- plot_single(haq_f, "High Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p2 <- plot_single(haq_u1, "High Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p3 <- plot_single(haq_u2, "High Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)

# Middle Morph Group
maq_f <- maq %>% filter(condition == "f")
maq_u1 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
maq_u2 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p4 <- plot_single(maq_f, "Middle Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p5 <- plot_single(maq_u1, "Middle Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p6 <- plot_single(maq_u2, "Middle Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p4)
print(p5)
print(p6)

# Low Morph Group
laq_f <- laq %>% filter(condition == "f")
laq_u1 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
laq_u2 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p7 <- plot_single(laq_f, "Low Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p8 <- plot_single(laq_u1, "Low Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p9 <- plot_single(laq_u2, "Low Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p7)
print(p8)
print(p9)
```

```{r}
# 创建符合APA格式的单个散点图函数(简化版,支持性别区分)
plot_single_apa <- function(data, cond, color, show_x_axis = TRUE, 
                            show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  mean_value <- mean(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 格式化p值(APA格式)
  if (p_value < 0.001) {
    p_text <- "p~`<`~.001"
  } else if (p_value < 0.01) {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.3f", p_value)
  } else {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.2f", p_value)
  }
  
  # 创建标签(使用expression格式)
  label_text <- sprintf("italic(r)~`=`~%.2f*','~%s", cor_value, p_text)
  
  # 确定标签位置(右上角)
  x_pos <- max(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  y_pos <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  
  # 创建标签数据框
  label_df <- data.frame(
    x = x_pos,
    y = y_pos,
    label = label_text
  )
  
  # 绘图(APA格式) - 按性别使用不同形状
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
    # 使用性别区分形状:圆形(f=16)和三角形(m=17)
    geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = color) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                       labels = c("f" = "Female", "m" = "Male"),
                       name = NULL) +
    
    # 回归线不区分性别,使用所有数据
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, 
                color = color, fill = color, linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_value, linetype = "dashed", 
                color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7)+    
    # 使用geom_text - 统计信息
    geom_text(data = label_df, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
              hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3.5, parse = TRUE,
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    
    # APA主题设置
    theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "sans") +
    
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    
    theme(
      # 坐标轴文字
      axis.text.x = if(show_x_axis) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = if(show_y_text) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      
      # 坐标轴线条和刻度
      axis.line.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.line.y = if(show_y_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = if(show_y_text) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      
      # 移除网格线(APA要求)
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      
      # 隐藏图例(因为会在外部统一添加)
      legend.position = "none",
      
      # 边距
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    ) +
    
    # 设置坐标轴范围
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1)))
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义APA推荐的颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#D55E00", "u1" = "#0072B2", "u2" = "#009E73")

# 准备所有数据
# High Morph Group
haq_f <- haq %>% filter(condition == "f")
haq_u1 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
haq_u2 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

# Middle Morph Group
maq_f <- maq %>% filter(condition == "f")
maq_u1 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
maq_u2 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

# Low Morph Group
laq_f <- laq %>% filter(condition == "f")
laq_u1 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
laq_u2 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

# 创建所有图表
# 第一行: Fearful (f)
p1 <- plot_single_apa(haq_f, "f", colors["f"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p2 <- plot_single_apa(maq_f, "f", colors["f"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p3 <- plot_single_apa(laq_f, "f", colors["f"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第二行: Uncertain 1 (u1)
p4 <- plot_single_apa(haq_u1, "u1", colors["u1"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p5 <- plot_single_apa(maq_u1, "u1", colors["u1"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p6 <- plot_single_apa(laq_u1, "u1", colors["u1"], 
                      show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第三行: Uncertain 2 (u2)
p7 <- plot_single_apa(haq_u2, "u2", colors["u2"], 
                      show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p8 <- plot_single_apa(maq_u2, "u2", colors["u2"], 
                      show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p9 <- plot_single_apa(laq_u2, "u2", colors["u2"], 
                      show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 使用patchwork包组合图表
library(patchwork)

# 组合图表
combined_plot <- (p1 | p2 | p3) /
                 (p4 | p5 | p6) /
                 (p7 | p8 | p9)

# 使用grid包添加自定义标签
library(grid)

# 创建一个带图例的图表(用于提取图例)
legend_plot <- ggplot(haq_f, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                     labels = c("f" = "Female", "m" = "Male"),
                     name = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12))

# 提取图例
library(gridExtra)
get_legend <- function(myggplot){
  tmp <- ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(myggplot))
  leg <- which(sapply(tmp$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  legend <- tmp$grobs[[leg]]
  return(legend)
}

legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

# 创建最终图表
grid.newpage()

# 绘制主图
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.52, width = 0.88, height = 0.88))
print(combined_plot, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

# 添加列标题 (顶部)
grid.text("High", x = 0.24, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Middle", x = 0.535, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Low", x = 0.83, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))

# 添加行标题 (左侧)
grid.text("F", x = 0.065, y = 0.77, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U1", x = 0.065, y = 0.52, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U2", x = 0.065, y = 0.27, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))

# 添加Y轴总标题 (左侧,旋转90度)
grid.text("Mean Left Gaze Time (s)", x = 0.02, y = 0.52, rot = 90, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

# 添加X轴总标题 (底部)
grid.text("AQ Score", x = 0.54, y = 0.09, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

# 添加图例 (底部中央)
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.54, y = 0.02, width = 0.3, height = 0.05))
grid.draw(legend)
popViewport()
```
```{r}
# 创建符合APA格式的单个散点图函数(简化版,支持性别区分)
plot_single_apa <- function(data, cond, color, show_x_axis = TRUE, 
                            show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  mean_value <- mean(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 格式化p值(APA格式)
  if (p_value < 0.001) {
    p_text <- "p~`<`~.001"
  } else if (p_value < 0.01) {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.3f", p_value)
  } else {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.2f", p_value)
  }
  
  # 创建标签(使用expression格式)
  label_text <- sprintf("italic(r)~`=`~%.2f*','~%s", cor_value, p_text)
  
  # 确定标签位置(右上角)
  x_pos <- max(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  y_pos <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  
  # 创建标签数据框
  label_df <- data.frame(
    x = x_pos,
    y = y_pos,
    label = label_text
  )
  
  # 绘图(APA格式) - 按性别使用不同形状
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
    # 使用性别区分形状:圆形(f=16)和三角形(m=17)
    geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = color) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                       labels = c("f" = "Female", "m" = "Male"),
                       name = NULL) +
    
    # 回归线不区分性别,使用所有数据
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, 
                color = color, fill = color, linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_value, linetype = "dashed", 
                color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7)+    
    # 使用geom_text - 统计信息
    geom_text(data = label_df, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
              hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4, parse = TRUE,
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    
    # APA主题设置
    theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "sans") +
    
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    
    theme(
      # 坐标轴文字
      axis.text.x = if(show_x_axis) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = if(show_y_text) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      
      # 坐标轴线条和刻度
      axis.line.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.line.y = if(show_y_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = if(show_y_text) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      
      # 移除网格线(APA要求)
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      
      # 隐藏图例(因为会在外部统一添加)
      legend.position = "none",
      
      # 边距
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    ) +
    
    # 设置坐标轴范围
```
