```{r}
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1)))
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义APA推荐的颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#D55E00", "u1" = "#0072B2", "u2" = "#009E73")

# 加载必需的包
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

# 图例提取函数
get_legend <- function(myggplot){
  tmp <- ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(myggplot))
  leg <- which(sapply(tmp$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  legend <- tmp$grobs[[leg]]
  return(legend)
}

# ========== 第一张图: Order = FU ==========
# 准备FU组数据
haq_fu <- haq %>% filter(order == "fu")
maq_fu <- maq %>% filter(order == "fu")
laq_fu <- laq %>% filter(order == "fu")

# 第一行: Fearful (f)
p1_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p2_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p3_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第二行: Uncertain 1 (u1)
p4_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p5_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p6_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第三行: Uncertain 2 (u2)
p7_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p8_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p9_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 组合图表
combined_plot_fu <- (p1_fu | p2_fu | p3_fu) /
                    (p4_fu | p5_fu | p6_fu) /
                    (p7_fu | p8_fu | p9_fu)

# 创建图例
legend_plot <- ggplot(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), 
                      aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  #scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                     #labels = c("f" = "Female", "m" = "Male"),
                     #name = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12))

legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

# 绘制FU图
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.52, width = 0.88, height = 0.88))
print(combined_plot_fu, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

# 添加标题和标签
#grid.text("Order: FU", x = 0.54, y = 0.99, gp = gpar(fontsize = 18, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("High", x = 0.24, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Middle", x = 0.535, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Low", x = 0.83, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("F", x = 0.065, y = 0.77, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U1", x = 0.065, y = 0.52, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U2", x = 0.065, y = 0.27, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("Mean Left Gaze Time (s)", x = 0.02, y = 0.52, rot = 90, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))
grid.text("AQ Score", x = 0.54, y = 0.09, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.54, y = 0.02, width = 0.3, height = 0.05))
grid.draw(legend)
popViewport()


# ========== 第二张图: Order = UF (调整condition顺序为u1, f, u2) ==========
# 准备UF组数据
haq_uf <- haq %>% filter(order == "uf")
maq_uf <- maq %>% filter(order == "uf")
laq_uf <- laq %>% filter(order == "uf")

# 第一行: Uncertain 1 (u1)
p1_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p2_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p3_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第二行: Fearful (f)
p4_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p5_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p6_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第三行: Uncertain 2 (u2)
p7_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p8_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p9_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 组合图表
combined_plot_uf <- (p1_uf | p2_uf | p3_uf) /
                    (p4_uf | p5_uf | p6_uf) /
                    (p7_uf | p8_uf | p9_uf)

# 绘制UF图
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.52, width = 0.88, height = 0.88))
print(combined_plot_uf, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

# 添加标题和标签 (注意行标签顺序变化)
#grid.text("Order: UF", x = 0.54, y = 0.99, gp = gpar(fontsize = 18, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("High", x = 0.24, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Middle", x = 0.535, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Low", x = 0.83, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("U1", x = 0.065, y = 0.77, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("F", x = 0.065, y = 0.52, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U2", x = 0.065, y = 0.27, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("Mean Left Gaze Time (s)", x = 0.02, y = 0.52, rot = 90, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))
grid.text("AQ Score", x = 0.54, y = 0.09, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.54, y = 0.02, width = 0.3, height = 0.05))
grid.draw(legend)
popViewport()
```
```{r}
# 创建符合APA格式的单个散点图函数(简化版,支持性别区分)
plot_single_apa <- function(data, cond, color, show_x_axis = TRUE, 
                            show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  mean_value <- mean(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 格式化p值(APA格式)
  if (p_value < 0.001) {
    p_text <- "p~`<`~.001"
  } else if (p_value < 0.01) {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.3f", p_value)
  } else {
    p_text <- sprintf("p~`=`~%.2f", p_value)
  }
  
  # 创建标签(使用expression格式) - 第一行:相关系数和p值
  label_text_line1 <- sprintf("italic(r)~`=`~%.2f*','~%s", cor_value, p_text)
  # 第二行:平均值
  label_text_line2 <- sprintf("italic(M)~`=`~%.2f", mean_value)
  
  # 确定标签位置(右上角)
  x_pos <- max(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  y_pos_line1 <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  y_pos_line2 <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.80  # 第二行稍微低一点
  
  # 创建标签数据框
  label_df <- data.frame(
    x = c(x_pos, x_pos),
    y = c(y_pos_line1, y_pos_line2),
    label = c(label_text_line1, label_text_line2)
  )
  
  # 绘图(APA格式) - 按性别使用不同形状
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
    # 使用性别区分形状:圆形(f=16)和三角形(m=17)
    geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = color) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                       name = NULL) +
    
    # 回归线不区分性别,使用所有数据
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.15, 
                color = color, fill = color, linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_value, linetype = "dashed", 
                color = "gray50", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +    
    # 使用geom_text - 统计信息(两行)
    geom_text(data = label_df, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
              hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4.5, parse = TRUE,
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
    
    # APA主题设置
    theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "sans") +
    
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    
    theme(
      # 坐标轴文字
      axis.text.x = if(show_x_axis) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = if(show_y_text) element_text(size = 12, color = "black") else element_blank(),
      
      # 坐标轴线条和刻度
      axis.line.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.line.y = if(show_y_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if(show_x_axis) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = if(show_y_text) element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) else element_blank(),
      
      # 移除网格线(APA要求)
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      
      # 隐藏图例(因为会在外部统一添加)
      legend.position = "none",
      
      # 边距
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    ) +
    
    # 设置坐标轴范围
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.1)))
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义APA推荐的颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#D55E00", "u1" = "#0072B2", "u2" = "#009E73")

# 加载必需的包
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

# 图例提取函数
get_legend <- function(myggplot){
  tmp <- ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(myggplot))
  leg <- which(sapply(tmp$grobs, function(x) x$name) == "guide-box")
  legend <- tmp$grobs[[leg]]
  return(legend)
}

# ========== 第一张图: Order = FU ==========
# 准备FU组数据
haq_fu <- haq %>% filter(order == "fu")
maq_fu <- maq %>% filter(order == "fu")
laq_fu <- laq %>% filter(order == "fu")

# 第一行: Fearful (f)
p1_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p2_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p3_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第二行: Uncertain 1 (u1)
p4_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p5_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p6_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第三行: Uncertain 2 (u2)
p7_fu <- plot_single_apa(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p8_fu <- plot_single_apa(maq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p9_fu <- plot_single_apa(laq_fu %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 组合图表
combined_plot_fu <- (p1_fu | p2_fu | p3_fu) /
                    (p4_fu | p5_fu | p6_fu) /
                    (p7_fu | p8_fu | p9_fu)

# 创建图例
legend_plot <- ggplot(haq_fu %>% filter(condition == "f"), 
                      aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = gender), alpha = 0.6, size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("f" = 16, "m" = 17),
                     labels = c("f" = "Female", "m" = "Male"),
                     name = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12))

legend <- get_legend(legend_plot)

# 绘制FU图
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.52, width = 0.88, height = 0.88))
print(combined_plot_fu, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

# 添加标题和标签
grid.text("High", x = 0.24, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Middle", x = 0.535, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Low", x = 0.83, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("F", x = 0.065, y = 0.77, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U1", x = 0.065, y = 0.52, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U2", x = 0.065, y = 0.27, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("Left Gaze Time (s)", x = 0.02, y = 0.52, rot = 90, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))
grid.text("AQ Score", x = 0.54, y = 0.09, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.54, y = 0.02, width = 0.3, height = 0.05))
grid.draw(legend)
popViewport()


# ========== 第二张图: Order = UF (调整condition顺序为u1, f, u2) ==========
# 准备UF组数据
haq_uf <- haq %>% filter(order == "uf")
maq_uf <- maq %>% filter(order == "uf")
laq_uf <- laq %>% filter(order == "uf")

# 第一行: Uncertain 1 (u1)
p1_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p2_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p3_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u1"), "u1", colors["u1"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第二行: Fearful (f)
p4_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p5_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p6_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "f"), "f", colors["f"], 
                         show_x_axis = FALSE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 第三行: Uncertain 2 (u2)
p7_uf <- plot_single_apa(haq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = TRUE)
p8_uf <- plot_single_apa(maq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)
p9_uf <- plot_single_apa(laq_uf %>% filter(condition == "u2"), "u2", colors["u2"], 
                         show_x_axis = TRUE, show_y_axis = TRUE, show_y_text = FALSE)

# 组合图表
combined_plot_uf <- (p1_uf | p2_uf | p3_uf) /
                    (p4_uf | p5_uf | p6_uf) /
                    (p7_uf | p8_uf | p9_uf)

# 绘制UF图
grid.newpage()
pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.5, y = 0.52, width = 0.88, height = 0.88))
print(combined_plot_uf, newpage = FALSE)
popViewport()

# 添加标题和标签 (注意行标签顺序变化)
grid.text("High", x = 0.24, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Middle", x = 0.535, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Low", x = 0.83, y = 0.96, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("U1", x = 0.065, y = 0.77, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("F", x = 0.065, y = 0.52, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("U2", x = 0.065, y = 0.27, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("Left Gaze Time (s)", x = 0.02, y = 0.52, rot = 90, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))
grid.text("AQ Score", x = 0.54, y = 0.09, 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "plain"))

pushViewport(viewport(x = 0.54, y = 0.02, width = 0.3, height = 0.05))
grid.draw(legend)
popViewport()
```


```{r}
# 创建一个函数来为单个condition和group绘图
plot_single <- function(data, group_name, cond, base_color) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  
  # 创建标签
  label_text <- sprintf("r = %.3f\np = %.3f", cor_value, p_value)
  
  # 确定标签位置
  x_pos <- min(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.05 * (max(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE) - min(data$AQ, na.rm = TRUE))
  #y_pos <- max(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95
  y_pos <- 0.8
  
  # 为fu和uf创建同色系的深浅色
  library(colorspace)
  color_fu <- darken(base_color, amount = 0.3)  # 深色给fu
  color_uf <- lighten(base_color, amount = 0.2)  # 浅色给uf
  
  # 绘图 - 按order使用不同深浅的颜色
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s, color = order)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2, 
                color = base_color, fill = base_color) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("fu" = color_fu, "uf" = color_uf),
                       labels = c("fu" = "FU", "uf" = "UF")) +
    annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_text, 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste(group_name, "-", toupper(cond)),
         x = "AQ Score",
         y = "Mean Left Gaze Time (s)",
         color = "Order") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "none")
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#E41A1C", "u1" = "#377EB8", "u2" = "#4DAF4A")

haq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="high")
maq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="middle")
laq <- subset(aq_data,percent_group=="low")

# High Morph Group
haq_f <- haq %>% filter(condition == "f")
haq_u1 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
haq_u2 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p1 <- plot_single(haq_f, "High Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p2 <- plot_single(haq_u1, "High Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p3 <- plot_single(haq_u2, "High Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)

# Middle Morph Group
maq_f <- maq %>% filter(condition == "f")
maq_u1 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
maq_u2 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p4 <- plot_single(maq_f, "Middle Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p5 <- plot_single(maq_u1, "Middle Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p6 <- plot_single(maq_u2, "Middle Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p4)
print(p5)
print(p6)

# Low Morph Group
laq_f <- laq %>% filter(condition == "f")
laq_u1 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
laq_u2 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p7 <- plot_single(laq_f, "Low Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p8 <- plot_single(laq_u1, "Low Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p9 <- plot_single(laq_u2, "Low Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])

print(p7)
print(p8)
print(p9)
```
```{r}
# 创建一个函数来为单个condition和group绘图
plot_single <- function(data, group_name, cond, base_color) {
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  
  # 计算线性回归方程
  lm_model <- lm(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ AQ, data = data)
  intercept <- coef(lm_model)[1]
  slope <- coef(lm_model)[2]
  
  # 创建标签 - 包含回归方程、相关系数和p值
  equation_text <- sprintf("y = %.4fx + %.4f", slope, intercept)
  label_text <- sprintf("%s\nr = %.3f\np = %.3f", equation_text, cor_value, p_value)
  
  # 确定标签位置
  x_pos <- 22  # 靠近右侧
  y_pos <- 0.15  # 底部位置
  
  # 为fu和uf创建同色系的深浅色
  library(colorspace)
  color_fu <- darken(base_color, amount = 0.3)  # 深色给fu
  color_uf <- lighten(base_color, amount = 0.2)  # 浅色给uf
  
  # 绘图 - 按order使用不同深浅的颜色
  p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s, color = order)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2, 
                color = base_color, fill = base_color) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("fu" = color_fu, "uf" = color_uf),
                       labels = c("fu" = "FU", "uf" = "UF")) +
    annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_text, 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
    xlim(5, 35) +  # 统一x轴范围
    ylim(0, 0.75) +   # 统一y轴范围
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste(group_name, "-", toupper(cond)),
         x = "AQ Score",
         y = "Mean Left Gaze Time (s)",
         color = "Order") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "none")
  
  return(p)
}

# 定义颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#E41A1C", "u1" = "#377EB8", "u2" = "#4DAF4A")
haq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "high")
maq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "middle")
laq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "low")

# High Morph Group
haq_f <- haq %>% filter(condition == "f")
haq_u1 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
haq_u2 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u2")
p1 <- plot_single(haq_f, "High Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p2 <- plot_single(haq_u1, "High Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p3 <- plot_single(haq_u2, "High Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])
print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)
```


```{r}
# Middle Morph Group
maq_f <- maq %>% filter(condition == "f")
maq_u1 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
maq_u2 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u2")
p4 <- plot_single(maq_f, "Middle Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p5 <- plot_single(maq_u1, "Middle Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p6 <- plot_single(maq_u2, "Middle Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])
print(p4)
print(p5)
print(p6)

# Low Morph Group
laq_f <- laq %>% filter(condition == "f")
laq_u1 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
laq_u2 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u2")
p7 <- plot_single(laq_f, "Low Morph Group", "f", colors["f"])
p8 <- plot_single(laq_u1, "Low Morph Group", "u1", colors["u1"])
p9 <- plot_single(laq_u2, "Low Morph Group", "u2", colors["u2"])
print(p7)
print(p8)
print(p9)
```


```{r}
# 提取斜率
model_f <- lm(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ AQ, data = haq_f)
model_u1 <- lm(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ AQ, data = haq_u1)
model_u2 <- lm(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ AQ, data = haq_u2)

cat("F 条件:\n")
cat("  斜率:", coef(model_f)[2], "\n")
cat("  Y 跨度:", abs(coef(model_f)[2]) * 25, "\n\n")

cat("U1 条件:\n")
cat("  斜率:", coef(model_u1)[2], "\n")
cat("  Y 跨度:", abs(coef(model_u1)[2]) * 25, "\n\n")

cat("U2 条件:\n")
cat("  斜率:", coef(model_u2)[2], "\n")
cat("  Y 跨度:", abs(coef(model_u2)[2]) * 25, "\n")
```

```{r}
# 创建一个函数来为单个condition、group和order绘图
plot_single <- function(data, group_name, cond, order_type, base_color) {
  # 筛选特定order的数据
  data_filtered <- data %>% filter(order == order_type)
  
  # 如果数据太少,返回NULL
  if(nrow(data_filtered) < 3) {
    warning(paste("Not enough data for", group_name, cond, order_type))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # 计算平均值
  mean_aq <- mean(data_filtered$AQ, na.rm = TRUE)
  mean_gaze <- mean(data_filtered$mean_left_gaze_time_s, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 计算相关系数和p值
  cor_test <- cor.test(data_filtered$mean_left_gaze_time_s, data_filtered$AQ)
  cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
  p_value <- cor_test$p.value
  
  # 计算线性回归方程
  lm_model <- lm(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ AQ, data = data_filtered)
  intercept <- coef(lm_model)[1]
  slope <- coef(lm_model)[2]
  
  # 创建标签 - 包含回归方程、相关系数和p值
  equation_text <- sprintf("y = %.4fx + %.4f", slope, intercept)
  label_text <- sprintf("%s\nr = %.3f\np = %.3f", equation_text, cor_value, p_value)
  
  # 标签放在右下角
  x_pos <- 22  # 靠近右侧
  y_pos <- 0.15  # 底部位置
  
  # 为fu和uf设置不同颜色深浅
  library(colorspace)
  if(order_type == "fu") {
    point_color <- darken(base_color, amount = 0.3)  # 深色给fu
  } else {
    point_color <- lighten(base_color, amount = 0.2)  # 浅色给uf
  }
  
  # 绘图
  p <- ggplot(data_filtered, aes(x = AQ, y = mean_left_gaze_time_s)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 3, color = point_color) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2, 
                color = base_color, fill = base_color) +
    # 添加平均值线
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean_gaze, linetype = "dashed", 
               color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_text, 
             hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
    xlim(5, 35) +  # 统一x轴范围
    ylim(0, 0.75) +   # 统一y轴范围
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = paste(group_name, "-", toupper(cond), "-", toupper(order_type)),
         x = "AQ Score",
         y = "Mean Left Gaze Time (s)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10))
  
  return(p)
}
```


```{r}
# 定义颜色
colors <- c("f" = "#E41A1C", "u1" = "#377EB8", "u2" = "#4DAF4A")

# 分组数据
haq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "high")
maq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "middle")
laq <- subset(aq_data, percent_group == "low")

# High Morph Group - 为每个condition的fu和uf分别绘图
haq_f <- haq %>% filter(condition == "f")
haq_u1 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
haq_u2 <- haq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p1_fu <- plot_single(haq_f, "High Morph Group", "f", "fu", colors["f"])
p1_uf <- plot_single(haq_f, "High Morph Group", "f", "uf", colors["f"])
p2_fu <- plot_single(haq_u1, "High Morph Group", "u1", "fu", colors["u1"])
p2_uf <- plot_single(haq_u1, "High Morph Group", "u1", "uf", colors["u1"])
p3_fu <- plot_single(haq_u2, "High Morph Group", "u2", "fu", colors["u2"])
p3_uf <- plot_single(haq_u2, "High Morph Group", "u2", "uf", colors["u2"])

print(p1_fu)
print(p1_uf)
print(p2_fu)
print(p2_uf)
print(p3_fu)
print(p3_uf)

# Middle Morph Group
maq_f <- maq %>% filter(condition == "f")
maq_u1 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
maq_u2 <- maq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p4_fu <- plot_single(maq_f, "Middle Morph Group", "f", "fu", colors["f"])
p4_uf <- plot_single(maq_f, "Middle Morph Group", "f", "uf", colors["f"])
p5_fu <- plot_single(maq_u1, "Middle Morph Group", "u1", "fu", colors["u1"])
p5_uf <- plot_single(maq_u1, "Middle Morph Group", "u1", "uf", colors["u1"])
p6_fu <- plot_single(maq_u2, "Middle Morph Group", "u2", "fu", colors["u2"])
p6_uf <- plot_single(maq_u2, "Middle Morph Group", "u2", "uf", colors["u2"])

print(p4_fu)
print(p4_uf)
print(p5_fu)
print(p5_uf)
print(p6_fu)
print(p6_uf)

# Low Morph Group
laq_f <- laq %>% filter(condition == "f")
laq_u1 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u1")
laq_u2 <- laq %>% filter(condition == "u2")

p7_fu <- plot_single(laq_f, "Low Morph Group", "f", "fu", colors["f"])
p7_uf <- plot_single(laq_f, "Low Morph Group", "f", "uf", colors["f"])
p8_fu <- plot_single(laq_u1, "Low Morph Group", "u1", "fu", colors["u1"])
p8_uf <- plot_single(laq_u1, "Low Morph Group", "u1", "uf", colors["u1"])
p9_fu <- plot_single(laq_u2, "Low Morph Group", "u2", "fu", colors["u2"])
p9_uf <- plot_single(laq_u2, "Low Morph Group", "u2", "uf", colors["u2"])

print(p7_fu)
print(p7_uf)
print(p8_fu)
print(p8_uf)
print(p9_fu)
print(p9_uf)
```
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(dplyr)

aq_data <- aq_data %>%
  mutate(block = case_when(
    # 当order为uf时
    order == "uf" & condition == "u1" ~ 1,
    order == "uf" & condition == "f"  ~ 2,
    order == "uf" & condition == "u2" ~ 3,
    
    # 当order为fu时
    order == "fu" & condition == "f"  ~ 1,
    order == "fu" & condition == "u1" ~ 2,
    order == "fu" & condition == "u2" ~ 3,
    
    # 如果有其他情况，返回NA
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  ))

model_full <- lmer(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ 
                     AQ * condition * order * percent_group*gender +
                     (1 | ID),  # 被试随机截距
                   data = aq_data,
                   REML = TRUE)

summary(model_full)

model_full2 <- lmer(mean_left_gaze_time_s ~ 
                     AQ * condition * order * percent_group*gender*block +
                     (1 | ID),  # 被试随机截距
                   data = aq_data,
                   REML = TRUE)

summary(model_full2)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# 全体AOIのデータ
total_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.6765, 0.5947, 0.7339, 0.7209, 0.6164, 0.8119, 0.6369, 0.5424, 0.6610,
    0.7704, 0.5938, 0.7346, 0.7305, 0.5872, 0.7468, 0.7453, 0.5360, 0.6454,
    0.7296, 0.6107, 0.8048, 0.6496, 0.5239, 0.6449, 0.5970, 0.4835, 0.5787,
    0.7702, 0.6818, 0.9273, 0.7434, 0.5610, 0.7121, 0.7415, 0.5311, 0.6585
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6392, 0.5659, 0.6989, 0.6610, 0.5694, 0.7381, 0.5719, 0.5121, 0.6087,
    0.7086, 0.5574, 0.6656, 0.6721, 0.5589, 0.6972, 0.6932, 0.4899, 0.6035,
    0.6281, 0.5700, 0.7129, 0.5997, 0.4760, 0.6039, 0.5543, 0.4271, 0.5179,
    0.7086, 0.6275, 0.8251, 0.6741, 0.5180, 0.6677, 0.6908, 0.4852, 0.6200
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7138, 0.6235, 0.7688, 0.7808, 0.6635, 0.8857, 0.7019, 0.5727, 0.7132,
    0.8322, 0.6302, 0.8036, 0.7888, 0.6156, 0.7965, 0.7974, 0.5822, 0.6874,
    0.8311, 0.6513, 0.8967, 0.6995, 0.5718, 0.6858, 0.6397, 0.5400, 0.6395,
    0.8317, 0.7361, 1.0295, 0.8126, 0.6040, 0.7564, 0.7922, 0.5769, 0.6969
  ),
  aoi_type = "Total"
)

# 左視野AOIのデータ
left_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.3700, 0.3483, 0.4115, 0.4255, 0.3656, 0.4490, 0.3841, 0.3255, 0.3920,
    0.3193, 0.2623, 0.3187, 0.2670, 0.2439, 0.2911, 0.3045, 0.2270, 0.2719,
    0.3576, 0.2905, 0.3840, 0.3312, 0.2661, 0.3237, 0.2754, 0.2453, 0.2781,
    0.3859, 0.3668, 0.4578, 0.3727, 0.3115, 0.3681, 0.3938, 0.3044, 0.3574
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.3315, 0.3142, 0.3688, 0.3674, 0.3330, 0.3967, 0.3292, 0.2842, 0.3563,
    0.2821, 0.2325, 0.2805, 0.2406, 0.2238, 0.2680, 0.2602, 0.1940, 0.2267,
    0.2539, 0.2309, 0.3014, 0.2513, 0.2199, 0.2556, 0.2057, 0.1852, 0.2108,
    0.3473, 0.3230, 0.4010, 0.3219, 0.2919, 0.3370, 0.3575, 0.2624, 0.3165
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.4085, 0.3823, 0.4542, 0.4837, 0.3982, 0.5013, 0.4390, 0.3668, 0.4277,
    0.3566, 0.2922, 0.3568, 0.2935, 0.2641, 0.3142, 0.3488, 0.2600, 0.3171,
    0.4613, 0.3502, 0.4666, 0.4111, 0.3122, 0.3918, 0.3450, 0.3053, 0.3454,
    0.4245, 0.4105, 0.5147, 0.4235, 0.3310, 0.3993, 0.4301, 0.3464, 0.3982
  ),
  aoi_type = "Left"
)

# データを結合
plot_data <- rbind(total_data, left_data)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

plot_data$aoi_type <- factor(plot_data$aoi_type,
                              levels = c("Total", "Left"))

# ブラケット作成関数（Total AOI用）
create_bracket_total <- function(order_val, gender_val, group_val, 
                          cond1, cond2, y_base, height_offset) {
  cond_map <- c("Friend" = 1, "Unknown1" = 2, "Unknown2" = 3)
  x_pos <- which(c("Low", "Middle", "High") == group_val)
  
  data.frame(
    order = order_val,
    gender = gender_val,
    percent_group = group_val,
    x = x_pos + (cond_map[cond1] - 2) * 0.15,
    xend = x_pos + (cond_map[cond2] - 2) * 0.15,
    y = y_base + height_offset,
    aoi_type = "Total",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Total AOIの有意差（FU条件）
# Female FU - Low組
fu_f_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.80, 0.05)
fu_f_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.80, 0.12)
fu_f_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.80, 0.19)
fu_f_low_3$label <- "***"

# Female FU - Middle組
fu_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.75, 0.05)
fu_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.75, 0.12)
fu_f_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.75, 0.19)
fu_f_mid_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Low組
fu_m_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.70, 0.05)
fu_m_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.70, 0.12)
fu_m_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.70, 0.19)
fu_m_low_3$label <- "***"

# Male FU - Middle組
fu_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.82, 0.05)
fu_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.12)
fu_m_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.19)
fu_m_mid_3$label <- "***"

# Total AOIの有意差（UF条件）
# Female UF - Low組
uf_f_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.80, 0.05)
uf_f_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.80, 0.12)
uf_f_low_2$label <- "***"

# Female UF - Middle組
uf_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.75, 0.05)
uf_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.75, 0.12)
uf_f_mid_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Low組
uf_m_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.05)
uf_m_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.12)
uf_m_low_2$label <- "***"

# Male UF - Middle組
uf_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.89, 0.05)
uf_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.89, 0.12)
uf_m_mid_2$label <- "***"

# Total AOIのすべてのブラケットを結合
sig_data_total <- rbind(
  fu_f_low_1, fu_f_low_2, fu_f_low_3,
  fu_f_mid_1, fu_f_mid_2, fu_f_mid_3,
  fu_m_low_1, fu_m_low_2, fu_m_low_3,
  fu_m_mid_1, fu_m_mid_2, fu_m_mid_3,
  uf_f_low_1, uf_f_low_2,
  uf_f_mid_1, uf_f_mid_2,
  uf_m_low_1, uf_m_low_2,
  uf_m_mid_1, uf_m_mid_2
)

# Left AOIの有意差（女性FU Friend条件のMiddle vs High）
sig_data_left <- data.frame(
  order = "fu",
  gender = "f",
  percent_group = "Middle",
  x = 2,
  xend = 3,
  y = 0.54,
  label = "***",
  aoi_type = "Left",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = interaction(condition, aoi_type),
                           linetype = aoi_type)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.3, size = 0.8,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = aoi_type), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  # Total AOI用のブラケット（水平線）
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.015, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_text(data = sig_data_total,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.02, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 4,
            family = "Arial") +
  # Left AOI用のブラケット
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_text(data = sig_data_left,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.025, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 3.5,
            family = "Arial") +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Total" = "solid", "Left" = "dashed"),
    name = "AOI Type"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Total" = 16, "Left" = 17),
    name = "AOI Type"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "AOI Gaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.15, 1.3), 
                     breaks = seq(0.2, 1.2, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),
    legend.box = "vertical",
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "combined_total_left_with_all_sig.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(extrafont)
library(ggh4x)

# 全体AOIのデータ
total_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.6765, 0.5947, 0.7339, 0.7209, 0.6164, 0.8119, 0.6369, 0.5424, 0.6610,
    0.7704, 0.5938, 0.7346, 0.7305, 0.5872, 0.7468, 0.7453, 0.5360, 0.6454,
    0.7296, 0.6107, 0.8048, 0.6496, 0.5239, 0.6449, 0.5970, 0.4835, 0.5787,
    0.7702, 0.6818, 0.9273, 0.7434, 0.5610, 0.7121, 0.7415, 0.5311, 0.6585
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.6392, 0.5659, 0.6989, 0.6610, 0.5694, 0.7381, 0.5719, 0.5121, 0.6087,
    0.7086, 0.5574, 0.6656, 0.6721, 0.5589, 0.6972, 0.6932, 0.4899, 0.6035,
    0.6281, 0.5700, 0.7129, 0.5997, 0.4760, 0.6039, 0.5543, 0.4271, 0.5179,
    0.7086, 0.6275, 0.8251, 0.6741, 0.5180, 0.6677, 0.6908, 0.4852, 0.6200
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.7138, 0.6235, 0.7688, 0.7808, 0.6635, 0.8857, 0.7019, 0.5727, 0.7132,
    0.8322, 0.6302, 0.8036, 0.7888, 0.6156, 0.7965, 0.7974, 0.5822, 0.6874,
    0.8311, 0.6513, 0.8967, 0.6995, 0.5718, 0.6858, 0.6397, 0.5400, 0.6395,
    0.8317, 0.7361, 1.0295, 0.8126, 0.6040, 0.7564, 0.7922, 0.5769, 0.6969
  ),
  aoi_type = "Total"
)

# 左視野AOIのデータ
left_data <- data.frame(
  order = c(
    rep("uf", 9), rep("uf", 9),
    rep("fu", 9), rep("fu", 9)
  ),
  gender = c(
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9),
    rep("m", 9), rep("f", 9)
  ),
  condition = rep(c("f", "f", "f", "u1", "u1", "u1", "u2", "u2", "u2"), 4),
  percent_group = rep(c("high", "low", "middle"), 12),
  mean_value = c(
    0.3700, 0.3483, 0.4115, 0.4255, 0.3656, 0.4490, 0.3841, 0.3255, 0.3920,
    0.3193, 0.2623, 0.3187, 0.2670, 0.2439, 0.2911, 0.3045, 0.2270, 0.2719,
    0.3576, 0.2905, 0.3840, 0.3312, 0.2661, 0.3237, 0.2754, 0.2453, 0.2781,
    0.3859, 0.3668, 0.4578, 0.3727, 0.3115, 0.3681, 0.3938, 0.3044, 0.3574
  ),
  cin_l = c(
    0.3315, 0.3142, 0.3688, 0.3674, 0.3330, 0.3967, 0.3292, 0.2842, 0.3563,
    0.2821, 0.2325, 0.2805, 0.2406, 0.2238, 0.2680, 0.2602, 0.1940, 0.2267,
    0.2539, 0.2309, 0.3014, 0.2513, 0.2199, 0.2556, 0.2057, 0.1852, 0.2108,
    0.3473, 0.3230, 0.4010, 0.3219, 0.2919, 0.3370, 0.3575, 0.2624, 0.3165
  ),
  cin_u = c(
    0.4085, 0.3823, 0.4542, 0.4837, 0.3982, 0.5013, 0.4390, 0.3668, 0.4277,
    0.3566, 0.2922, 0.3568, 0.2935, 0.2641, 0.3142, 0.3488, 0.2600, 0.3171,
    0.4613, 0.3502, 0.4666, 0.4111, 0.3122, 0.3918, 0.3450, 0.3053, 0.3454,
    0.4245, 0.4105, 0.5147, 0.4235, 0.3310, 0.3993, 0.4301, 0.3464, 0.3982
  ),
  aoi_type = "Left"
)

# データを結合
plot_data <- rbind(total_data, left_data)

plot_data$percent_group <- factor(plot_data$percent_group,
                                   levels = c("low", "middle", "high"),
                                   labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High"))

plot_data$condition <- factor(plot_data$condition,
                               levels = c("f", "u1", "u2"),
                               labels = c("Friend", "Unknown1", "Unknown2"))

plot_data$aoi_type <- factor(plot_data$aoi_type,
                              levels = c("Total", "Left"))

# ブラケット作成関数（Total AOI用）
create_bracket_total <- function(order_val, gender_val, group_val, 
                          cond1, cond2, y_base, height_offset) {
  cond_map <- c("Friend" = 1, "Unknown1" = 2, "Unknown2" = 3)
  x_pos <- which(c("Low", "Middle", "High") == group_val)
  
  data.frame(
    order = order_val,
    gender = gender_val,
    percent_group = group_val,
    x = x_pos + (cond_map[cond1] - 2) * 0.15,
    xend = x_pos + (cond_map[cond2] - 2) * 0.15,
    y = y_base + height_offset,
    aoi_type = "Total",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# 各パネルの基準高度を設定（データの最大値に基づいて調整）
# FU Female: 基準高度を0.85に
fu_f_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.92, 0.04)
fu_f_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.92, 0.10)
fu_f_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_low_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2",0.92, 0.16)
fu_f_low_3$label <- "***"

fu_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.92, 0.04)
fu_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.92, 0.10)
fu_f_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_f_mid_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.92, 0.16)
fu_f_mid_3$label <- "***"

# FU Male: 基準高度を0.88に
fu_m_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.88, 0.04)
fu_m_low_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.88, 0.10)
fu_m_low_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_low_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.88, 0.16)
fu_m_low_3$label <- "***"

fu_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown1", 0.88, 0.04)
fu_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.88, 0.10)
fu_m_mid_2$label <- "***"
fu_m_mid_3 <- create_bracket_total("fu", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.88, 0.16)
fu_m_mid_3$label <- "***"

# UF Female: 基準高度を0.82に
uf_f_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.04)
uf_f_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.10)
uf_f_low_2$label <- "***"

uf_f_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.04)
uf_f_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_f_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "f", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.82, 0.10)
uf_f_mid_2$label <- "***"

# UF Male: 基準高度を0.95に（データの最大値が高いため）
uf_m_low_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Low", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.95, 0.04)
uf_m_low_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_low_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Low", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.95, 0.10)
uf_m_low_2$label <- "***"

uf_m_mid_1 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Middle", "Friend", "Unknown2", 0.95, 0.04)
uf_m_mid_1$label <- "***"
uf_m_mid_2 <- create_bracket_total("uf", "m", "Middle", "Unknown1", "Unknown2", 0.95, 0.10)
uf_m_mid_2$label <- "***"

# Total AOIのすべてのブラケットを結合
sig_data_total <- rbind(
  fu_f_low_1, fu_f_low_2, fu_f_low_3,
  fu_f_mid_1, fu_f_mid_2, fu_f_mid_3,
  fu_m_low_1, fu_m_low_2, fu_m_low_3,
  fu_m_mid_1, fu_m_mid_2, fu_m_mid_3,
  uf_f_low_1, uf_f_low_2,
  uf_f_mid_1, uf_f_mid_2,
  uf_m_low_1, uf_m_low_2,
  uf_m_mid_1, uf_m_mid_2
)

# Left AOIの有意差（女性FU Friend条件のMiddle vs High）
sig_data_left <- data.frame(
  order = "fu",
  gender = "f",
  percent_group = "Middle",
  x = 2,
  xend = 3,
  y = 0.50,  # 高度を調整
  label = "***",
  aoi_type = "Left",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# プロット作成
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = percent_group, y = mean_value, 
                           color = condition, group = interaction(condition, aoi_type),
                           linetype = aoi_type)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = cin_l, ymax = cin_u), 
                width = 0.3, size = 0.8,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = aoi_type), size = 2, position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  # Total AOI用のブラケット（水平線）
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_total,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.012, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_text(data = sig_data_total,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.018, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 4,
            family = "Arial") +
  # Left AOI用のブラケット
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y - 0.010, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(data = sig_data_left,
               aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y - 0.010, yend = y),
               inherit.aes = FALSE,
               color = "black",
               size = 0.4) +
  geom_text(data = sig_data_left,
            aes(x = (x + xend) / 2, y = y + 0.020, label = label),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            size = 3.5,
            family = "Arial") +
  facet_grid2(order ~ gender,
              labeller = labeller(gender = c(f = "Female", m = "Male"),
                                 order = c(fu = "FU", uf = "UF")),
              axes = "all",
              remove_labels = "all") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Friend" = "#9370DB", 
               "Unknown1" = "#FFA500", 
               "Unknown2" = "#4169E1"),
    name = "Condition"
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Total" = "solid", "Left" = "dashed"),
    name = "AOI Type"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Total" = 16, "Left" = 17),
    name = "AOI Type"
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "AOI Gaze Time (s)") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.15, 1.3), 
                     breaks = seq(0.2, 1.2, 0.2)) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "Arial") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", family = "Arial"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20, family = "Arial"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15, family = "Arial"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, family = "Arial"),
    legend.box = "vertical",
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "combined_total_left_with_all_sig_adjusted.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
